title: tragia nepetifolia var. angustifolia
intro: Tragia nepetifolia var. angustifolia, also known as Narrow-leaved Horseweed or Tragia, is a species of plant in the Euphorbiaceae family, native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Tragia nepetifolia var. angustifolia include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antibacterial agent. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine and herbalism.
